Skip to contents
universe 1.0.0
    • Reference

    Download snapshot

    Source: R/snapshot.R
    snapshot.Rd

    Downloads a full copy (snapshot) of an R package repository.

    Usage

    repo_snapshot(repo, destdir = "snapshot", bin_versions = r_version())

r_version()

    Arguments

    repo

    url of the cran-like repository to snapshot

    bin_versions

    vector with versions of R to download the win/mac binary packages. The default is to download binaries only for your local version. Set to NULL to not download any binaries.

    Examples

    repo_snapshot('https://jeroen.r-universe.dev', bin_versions = c("4.1", "4.2", "4.3"))
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/src/contrib
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/windows/contrib/4.1
#> Warning: Repository is empty: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/windows/contrib/4.1
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/macosx/contrib/4.1
#> Warning: Repository is empty: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/macosx/contrib/4.1
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/windows/contrib/4.2
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/macosx/contrib/4.2
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/windows/contrib/4.3
#> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/bin/macosx/contrib/4.3
#>   [1] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/PACKAGES"            
#>   [2] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/PACKAGES.gz"         
#>   [3] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/RAppArmor_3.2.4.tgz" 
#>   [4] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/V8_4.4.2.tgz"        
#>   [5] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/badgen_1.0.0.tgz"    
#>   [6] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/base64_2.0.1.tgz"    
#>   [7] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/bcrypt_1.2.tgz"      
#>   [8] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/brotli_1.3.0.tgz"    
#>   [9] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/curl_5.2.1.tgz"      
#>  [10] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/gpg_1.2.9.tgz"       
#>  [11] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/js_1.2.tgz"          
#>  [12] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/jsonlite_1.8.8.tgz"  
#>  [13] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/maketools_1.3.0.tgz" 
#>  [14] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/mongolite_2.7.3.tgz" 
#>  [15] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/openssl_2.1.1.tgz"   
#>  [16] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/protolite_2.3.0.tgz" 
#>  [17] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/rjade_0.1.1.tgz"     
#>  [18] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/sys_3.4.2.tgz"       
#>  [19] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/timestamp.txt"       
#>  [20] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/unix_1.5.7.tgz"      
#>  [21] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/webp_1.2.0.tgz"      
#>  [22] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.2/webutils_1.2.0.tgz"  
#>  [23] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/PACKAGES"            
#>  [24] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/PACKAGES.gz"         
#>  [25] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/RAppArmor_3.2.4.tgz" 
#>  [26] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/V8_4.4.2.tgz"        
#>  [27] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/badgen_1.0.0.tgz"    
#>  [28] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/base64_2.0.1.tgz"    
#>  [29] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/bcrypt_1.2.tgz"      
#>  [30] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/brotli_1.3.0.tgz"    
#>  [31] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/curl_5.2.1.tgz"      
#>  [32] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/gpg_1.2.9.tgz"       
#>  [33] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/js_1.2.tgz"          
#>  [34] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/jsonlite_1.8.8.tgz"  
#>  [35] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/maketools_1.3.0.tgz" 
#>  [36] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/mongolite_2.7.3.tgz" 
#>  [37] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/openssl_2.1.1.tgz"   
#>  [38] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/protolite_2.3.0.tgz" 
#>  [39] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/rjade_0.1.1.tgz"

#>  [44] "bin/macosx/contrib/4.3/webutils_1.2.0.tgz"  
#>  [45] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/PACKAGES"           
#>  [46] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/PACKAGES.gz"        
#>  [47] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/V8_4.4.2.zip"       
#>  [48] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/badgen_1.0.0.zip"

#>  [54] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/js_1.2.zip"         
#>  [55] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/jsonlite_1.8.8.zip" 
#>  [56] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/maketools_1.3.0.zip"
#>  [57] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/mongolite_2.7.3.zip"
#>  [58] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/openssl_2.1.1.zip"  
#>  [59] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/protolite_2.3.0.zip"
#>  [60] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/rjade_0.1.1.zip"    
#>  [61] "bin/windows/contrib/4.2/sys_3.4.2.zip"
